message:
feat(common): extend types with SelfTestConfig and build tracking fields

Adds configuration types for automated self-testing and extends existing
request/response types with build tracking fields for active build
monitoring in the dashboard.

Build tracking fields:
- SelectionRequest.command: Optional full command string for display
  in active builds list (e.g., "cargo build --release")
- SelectionResponse.build_id: Optional daemon-assigned build ID for
  correlating selection with completion events
- ReleaseRequest.build_id: Optional build ID to mark complete when
  releasing worker slots

SelfTestConfig:
- enabled: Toggle scheduled self-tests
- schedule_cron: Cron expression for test schedule (default "0 0 * * *")
- on_failure: SelfTestFailureAction enum for automatic remediation

SelfTestFailureAction enum:
- Alert: Only emit log/alert entry
- DisableWorker: Automatically disable failing worker
- AlertAndDisable: Both alert and disable

SelfTestWorkers enum:
- All(String): Special "all" value or single worker ID
- List(Vec<WorkerId>): Explicit worker list for targeted testing
- resolve() method returns None for "all" or Some(vec) for explicit

These types enable:
- Active build tracking in the TUI and web dashboard
- Automated self-test scheduling with configurable remediation
- Flexible worker targeting for self-test runs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
